title: Jesus
questions: Is Jesus important in your life?
What goes through your mind when you see images of Jesus?
Do you think Jesus was really white, with light brown hair and blue eyes?
What do you know about Jesus' birth?
What would Jesus do if he were alive on Earth today?
Why did Jesus have only male disciples?
Do you think it's OK to name your son Jesus?
Is there such a thing as too much Jesus?
The Bible says little or nothing about Jesus when he was in his teens and early twenties. What happened to him then?
Do you believe Jesus is the son of God?
What do you know about Jesus' death?
Why is Jesus so important to Christians?
What do you think when people say 'Jesus' or 'Jesus Christ' when they are angry?
What would the world be like today if Jesus had never existed?
How would the world be different today if God had had a daughter instead of a son?
What were the teachings of Jesus?
Do you think Jesus needs to come back to the world today?
What questions would you like to ask Jesus? What do you think his answers would be?
